name: Bonnie McFarlane
blurb: She has had specials on HBO and Comedy Central and appeared on The Tonight Show and the Late Show.
bio: Bonnie McFarlane is a Canadian comedian, writer, and filmmaker who competed on the second season of Last Comic Standing and co-hosts the podcast My Wife Hates Me with her husband, comedian Rich Vos. She has had specials on HBO and Comedy Central and appeared on The Tonight Show and the Late Show. She wrote and directed the documentary Women Aren't Funny and published the memoir You're Better Than Me.

timeline.ev: Competes on season two of Last Comic Standing
Films her own HBO One Night Stand special
Releases the documentary Women Aren't Funny
Publishes the memoir You're Better Than Me
